allow: PowerShell(cd D:\\Playground\\jav_tool; Get-ChildItem index.html, data.js, app.js, start.bat | Select-Object Name, @{N='Size';E={'{0:N0} KB' -f \($_.Length/1KB\)}})
PowerShell(cd D:\\Playground\\jav_tool; Get-ChildItem index.html, data.js, app.js, start.bat | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.Name\): $\([math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB, 1\)\) KB" })

PowerShell(cd D:\\Playground\\jav_tool; if \(Test-Path meta_cache.json\) { $content = Get-Content meta_cache.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $props = $content.PSObject.Properties; $total = $props.Count; $empty = \($props | Where-Object { -not $_.Value.cover -and -not $_.Value.title }\).Count; "Total entries: $total`nEmpty \(no cover AND no title\): $empty" } else { "meta_cache.json not found" })
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['name']\) for m in d.get\('models',[]\)]")
